title: Why is podman compose not available on non x86_64 & non arm?
body:
`podman compose` is excluded via build tags from building on anything but arm64 & x86_64. Is there a particular reason for that? 

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/c9b61b08c666482113ca787368b08943f69ff108/cmd/podman/compose.go#L1

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out!  I think that's probably a copy-paste error that happened when creating the file.
